instruction: I have a directory named "todo_list_Jan_1". Can you help me change its name into "todo_list_Jan_2"?

evaluator.eval: exact_match(get_vm_command_line(env, config={'command': "[ -d ~/Desktop/todo_list_Jan_2 ] && echo 'Directory exists.' || echo 'Directory does not exist.'", 'shell': True}), get_rule(env, config={'rules': {'expected': 'Directory exists.\n'}}))
